statement.p: The formula for a spheres volume is V=\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3\text{,} where V is the volume and r is the radius. And \pi is a number that is about 3.14\text{.} If we know the volume of a sphere is {{\frac{256}{1029}}\pi } then we have the equation {{\frac{256}{1029}}\pi }={{\frac{4}{3}}\pi r^{3}}\text{.} Is the radius {{\frac{6}{7}}}\text{?}
